description: CompositionYellow round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic and flock print on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash warm inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsTreat yourself or a friend to this stylishly comfortable T-shirt in yellow from mr. men.
